summary:
Minute amounts of carbon in phosphate-bonded investments cause undesirable oxidation reactions resulting in black discolored castings; thus, they must be entirely removed to ensure proper casting results without complications affecting patients' treatment success and satisfaction. Maintaining a contamination-free environment is crucial for achieving high-quality restorations and preserving professional integrity.
